utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each contains full details: a plan name, type, description, and cost for the first four items, and a complete cost breakdown (monthly and annual) for total_budget. Therefore, every required item is fully specified with all necessary details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected 'InsurePlus Standard Plan5' as a bundled plan for all categories (health, property, travel, and additional services). Although the name contains 'Plan5', there is no separate rating entry for that suffix in the ground-truth dataset. The closest match is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for health and travel, and 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' for property. No separate 'additional services' or 'enhanced services' plan is listed in ground-truth, so only the three InsurePlus components can be mapped. According to the ground-truth data: (1) 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under both physical and mental health has a rating of 6, (2) 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' under property protection has a rating of 7, and (3) 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under travel insurance has a rating of 7. Thus, the AI assistant’s bundled selection corresponds to those ratings.
